name: UX Starter
description: Common usability and user experience checks.

rubrics.name: Clear headline or value proposition
rubrics.criteria: Within 5 seconds of landing, a new visitor can understand what this page or product does from a prominent headline or hero text.

rubrics.name: Primary call-to-action is visible above the fold
rubrics.criteria: The primary next step a user should take is visible without scrolling on a 1280x800 viewport.
